message:
fix: add Token settings validation (warning < critical, limit > 0 confirm) (#8888)

Adds two missing validations in TokenUsageSection.tsx:
- #8869: warning threshold must be strictly less than critical threshold;
  Save is blocked with an inline error when warning >= critical.
- #8870: when token limit is set to 0 (which effectively disables all
  AI operations), prompt for explicit confirmation before saving so the
  user can't silently nuke their AI budget.

Adds two i18n keys under settings.tokens.validation.*; other locales
fall back to English per i18next config.

Fixes #8869, Fixes #8870

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
